subcodes.title: Words spoken at El Grosse Bldg. in Los Angeles, 1912-10-19
subcodes.first_line: This is a good gathering, a good meeting. This assemblage is the assemblage of God…. Do not look at your small number. Plurality of numbers is not of importance.
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @love and unity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @call to action, @fewness of numbers not regarded in teaching the Cause, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @thankfulness; gratitude, @teaching one's self first in teaching the Cause
